Title: Conjure
Description: Spawns a temporary area zone at a position

anchor.Title: Anchor
anchor.Description: Center position or entity for the zone

duration.Title: Duration
duration.Description: Duration of the conjured zone in seconds

entity.Title: Target Entity Output
entity.Description: Variable to store the targeted entity in

conjuration.Title: Conjuration Output
conjuration.Description: Variable to store the conjured area in
